pi_items.source: task.json description (line 2: 'Create a new Role named ROLE_DATA_ANALYST'), verified against setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py which all reference this exact role name consistently
task.json description (line 2: 'Create a new User named analyst_jones'), verified against setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py which all reference this exact username consistently
task.json description (line 2: 'Create a new User named analyst_jones with password Analyst2024!'), verified against export_result.sh line 40 which uses this password for authentication test

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a new GeoServer security role named 'ROLE_DATA_ANALYST' and a new user account named 'analyst_jones' with password 'Analyst2024!'. The user is assigned the created role. The task operates within a GeoServer 2.25.2 environment that uses real public Natural Earth geospatial datasets (ne_110m_admin_0_countries, ne_110m_populated_places, ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines, ne_110m_lakes) sourced from naturalearthdata.org and provides access to a PostGIS database. The verification is performed via REST API authentication using the new credentials against the GeoServer REST endpoint.
